hero.eyebrow: Remote Financial Operations for US Businesses
hero.headline: Your Finance Department. Without the Overhead.
hero.subheadline: We provide institutional-grade bookkeeping, tax strategy, and financial intelligence for US small and mid-sized businesses — at a fraction of in-house cost.

services.title: Professional Bookkeeping & Cleanup
services.description: Comprehensive monthly categorization, bank reconciliations, chart of accounts optimization, and full catch-up services for disorganized books. QBO & Xero certified.

services.title: Tax Strategy & Preparation
services.description: Federal tax returns prepared for all entity types, with strategic year-round planning to legally minimize tax liability. We partner with licensed CPAs for review and filing sign-off.

services.title: Custom Financial Intelligence Apps
services.description: Python-powered dashboards, advanced Excel models, cash flow tracking systems, payment analytics portals, and reconciliation tools built for your specific business needs.

services.title: Due Diligence & Loan Advisory
services.description: SBA loan packages, lender-grade financial narratives, Quality of Earnings (QoE) analysis, and M&A due diligence support — informed by 14+ years of credit underwriting.

services.title: Executive Support & Operations
services.description: Email management, calendar coordination, client follow-up systems, CRM maintenance — keeping your communications organized so you can focus on strategic decisions.

services.title: Digital Presence & Thought Leadership
services.description: LinkedIn content strategy, financial education content, client success storytelling, and consistent professional presence — positioning you as a trusted industry leader.

cases.title: "18 Months of Financial Records Cleaned and Optimized in 3 Weeks"
cases.body: A Texas-based general contractor had not reconciled accounts in over 18 months. We completed full backlog cleanup, identified deductible expenses, restructured the chart of accounts, and produced lender-ready financials for an SBA loan application — all within the first month of engagement.

cases.title: "Our First Clean P&L in Four Years — Ready for Investors"
cases.body: An insurance restoration company with multiple active projects had commingled personal and business finances for years. We separated accounts, built project-level P&Ls, cleaned 4 years of records, and delivered investor-ready financials in under 6 weeks.

cases.title: "Saved the S-Corp Election Deadline With 3 Days to Spare"
cases.body: A Florida-based management consultant earning $280K had been filing as a sole proprietor. We identified the S-Corp opportunity, coordinated CPA election filing, restructured compensation, and set up a payroll system — saving significant self-employment tax in year one.

pricing.name: Foundation
pricing.description: For startups and solopreneurs who need clean books and basic tax support.

pricing.name: Growth
pricing.description: For growing businesses that need comprehensive financial operations.

pricing.name: Enterprise
pricing.description: Full-service financial operations for multi-entity or high-complexity businesses.

process.title: Discovery Call
process.description: 30-minute consultation to understand your business, pain points, and goals. No commitment required.

process.title: Proposal & Scope
process.description: We deliver a custom engagement proposal with clear deliverables, timeline, and pricing.

process.title: Onboarding
process.description: Secure access setup, document collection, and system integrations. We handle the technical lift.

process.title: First Deliverable
process.description: You receive your first output — clean books, a report, or a financial model — within the first week.
